summary: This source is a directory of Ian Goodfellow's presentations, categorized into Invited Talks, Contributed Talks, and Miscellaneous. It primarily lists slide decks and video links for his lectures on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), adversarial examples, and machine learning security, but does not contain transcripts or detailed notes of his thought processes.
heuristics: Use Computer Modern fonts in presentation slides so that the main text matches the font of equations copied from TeX.
